segments.text: She raised 30 years of Adobe's hard work
in just 3 years. Why is design only for
pros? Photoshop was so complex, most
quit before they even begin. Melanie
Parkkins has no coding, no money, just
one question. Design should be for
everyone, right? For 3 years, she hunted
a tech team. Over 100 investors said no,
but she did not stop. Then she launched
Canva. Design right in your browsers. No
install, no hassle. Adobe kept building
desktop suits. She made it instant. They
even copied her and slashed their
prices. But guess what? It did not work.
Today, Canva has 180 million users and a
$40 billion valuations. A girl with no
biggest giants. If you want more amazing
